'''Rai-Kalei''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] pilot who lived in times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Rai-Kalei began his career as a pilot for [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. He used a [[XS-800 light freighter|XS-800]] freighter, the [[Mayjeln (freighter)|''Mayjeln'']], named for the [[Mayjeln|famous Sullustan scout]]. The ''Mayjeln'' was modified by Rai-Kalei, without knowledge of his employers, to provide a turret-mounted double laser cannon, a quad laser cannon also in turret, and a single blaster cannon. The cargo bay was also modified to keep 115 metric tons, including eight passengers in a living space.<ref name="AJ4" />

However, he had a hostile encounter with Imperial forces, during which he used some weaponry. Not wanting such a bad example, SoroSuub fired Rai-Kalei. Knowing that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] would write a search order for him, Rai-Kalei fled Sullust with the ''Mayjeln''.<ref name="AJ4" />

Rai-Kalei began a life of smuggling. He became an expert transporting illegal goods, including living beings and people, across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], still using the ''Mayjeln''.<ref name="AJ4" />

In time, Rai-Kalei joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a smuggler and informant.<ref name="AJ4" />
